name: 每周工作周报（周五 15:00）
description: Cloud Automation：汇总当周日程/待办，按售前/项目/产品生成周报并推送到企微机器人。

prompts:
You are a Cursor Cloud Automation scheduled job.

0. **First**, run and wait for success: `bun run scripts/ensure-wecom-ws.ts` (WebSocket preflight; auto reconnect/retry up to 3 times, 5 min apart). Exit non-zero if it fails.
1. Read and strictly follow `config/automation-prompts/weekly-report.txt` in this repository.
2. Use wecom-cli to fetch last week + this week schedules and todos (Asia/Shanghai). Ensure wecom-cli is on PATH; use Cloud Agent secrets for auth if needed.
3. Generate the weekly report in WeCom Markdown per that file (last week / this week, 售前/项目/产品 modules, strikethrough for completed last-week items).
4. **Must push** to WeCom bot:
   `bun run scripts/push-wecom-markdown.ts --title "📊 工作周报 · YYYY-MM-DD" --text "<full markdown>"`
5. Exit non-zero if push fails. Do not only print to chat — delivery is via the push script.

Required env (Cloud Agent secrets or wecom/.env): WECOM_BOT_ID, WECOM_BOT_SECRET, WECOM_CHAT_ID (default LiuHaoCheng).
